meta.title: Mateico — Custom laser-engraved mates in Amsterdam
meta.description: Handcrafted mates with custom laser engraving. Your story, engraved by hand. Football, family, love, anime and more. From Amsterdam.

hero.title: Your story, engraved by hand
hero.subtitle: Handcrafted mates with custom laser engraving. Each piece is unique, just like you.
hero.success: You're in! We'll let you know when we launch.

items.river: River Plate engraving — passion in every detail
items.familia: "A mother's love is unbeatable" — for your loved ones
items.amor: Personalized with name and message — a gift that moves
items.tipos: Wood, gourd, leather — choose your style
items.riverBombilla: Complete mate with bombilla — ready to brew

categories.title: Find your mate
categories.subtitle: Every passion deserves its mate. What's yours?
categories.customDesc: Whatever you dream, we engrave it

craft.title: Engraved with soul
craft.text1: Each mate goes through our hands and a high-precision laser that engraves your design into wood, metal or gourd.
craft.text2: This isn't mass production. It's one by one, with patience and care. That's why we have a waiting list.
craft.text3: From Amsterdam, with River Plate soul.

waitlistCta.title: Want yours?
waitlistCta.subtitle: Leave your email and we'll let you know when it's your turn.
waitlistCta.success: You're in! We'll write to you soon.

footer.tagline: Custom mates with Argentine soul, made in Amsterdam.
